title: Otophylla michauxii

The classification of Otophylla michauxii is as follows: it belongs to the kingdom Plantae, the family Rubiaceae, the genus Otophylla, and the species O. michauxii. The genus Otophylla is a group of flowering plants that are commonly known as the "haircap" plants. Otophylla michauxii is a member of the tribe Psychotrieae within the family Rubiaceae.
